source_requirement: Plan/07_IMPLEMENTATION/COMFYUI_WIRING_REPAIR_LIST.md Priority 2: Create control-map preprocessing module; feed actual control maps into ControlNet, not arbitrary RGB placeholders.

processing_summary.raw_control: Pillow grayscale fit 1024x1024, FIND_EDGES, autocontrast cutoff=1, threshold >=36 to white on black.
processing_summary.clean_control: Resize 1024->512 bilinear, median filter size=3, max filter size=3, threshold >=96, min filter size=3, resize 512->1024 nearest.
processing_summary.placeholder_rejection: The active Canny lane control image is a deterministic generated control map from the recorded source portrait, not an arbitrary RGB placeholder.

visual_review.finding: The cleaned map is a high-contrast white-on-black Canny-style portrait edge map with preserved head/shoulder silhouette and reduced facial/eye speckle relative to the raw edge map intent.

not_certified_reasons: This does not prove target-runtime behavior for the current v6 Canny prompt candidate.
Target-runtime static proof, bounded generation, pullback, technical QA, and strict whole-image visual QA remain required before Canny promotion.
next_action: Keep the cleaned eye-safe generated control map as the ControlNet input for the current Canny lane; continue local-first with the next named wiring or QA task.
